scripts.schema:fusion: mkdir -p skills/fusion/schema && ts-json-schema-generator --path skills/fusion/lib/types.ts --type PanelRequest --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out skills/fusion/schema/panel-request.schema.json && ts-json-schema-generator --path skills/fusion/lib/types.ts --type WorkerRequest --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out skills/fusion/schema/worker-request.schema.json && ts-json-schema-generator --path skills/fusion/lib/types.ts --type WorkerResult --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out skills/fusion/schema/worker-result.schema.json && ts-json-schema-generator --path skills/fusion/lib/types.ts --type JudgeAnalysis --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out skills/fusion/schema/judge-analysis.schema.json && ts-json-schema-generator --path skills/fusion/lib/types.ts --type SynthesisResult --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out skills/fusion/schema/synthesis-result.schema.json && ts-json-schema-generator --path skills/fusion/lib/types.ts --type PanelResult --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out skills/fusion/schema/panel-result.schema.json
